terminals.name: Tests
terminals.command: cd /workspace && echo '=== Unity Test Runner ===' && echo '' && echo 'To run ContactManager tests:' && echo '  ./tests/parallel_run.sh tests/test_contact_manager/' && echo '' && echo 'To run a specific test:' && echo '  ./tests/parallel_run.sh tests/test_contact_manager/test_ask.py' && echo '' && echo 'To debug CI failures (download artifacts):' && echo '  gh run download <run-id> -n pytest-logs-* -D /tmp/ci-logs'
